code: import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL='http://localhost:5000/product-types';export const getProductTypes=()=>axios.get(API_BASE_URL);export const getProductType=id=>axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/${id}`);export const createProductType=data=>axios.post(API_BASE_URL,data);export const updateProductType=(id,data)=>axios.put(`${API_BASE_URL}/${id}`,data);export const deleteProductType=id=>axios.delete(`${API_BASE_URL}/${id}`);
